title: Care Gaps
description: Care Gaps identifies patients who have not received recommended clinical interventions based on defined quality measures. By linking cohort definitions to evidence-based guidelines, care teams can prioritise outreach and close gaps in preventive care, chronic disease management, and medication adherence.
tips: Define your denominator and numerator cohorts precisely to ensure care gap calculations reflect the intended patient population.
Combine Care Gaps with Patient Timelines to understand the longitudinal context behind each identified gap.
Export care gap results to your care management system to trigger targeted patient outreach workflows.
Refresh care gap calculations on a scheduled basis to reflect new claims, encounters, and lab data as they arrive.
Use stratification by provider or facility to identify systemic patterns in care delivery and target quality improvement initiatives.
